title: Trump presidency to target Iran but ultimately it is China's decision that matters
section_path: Trump presidency to target Iran but ultimately it is China's decision that matters
section_path_text: Trump presidency to target Iran but ultimately it is China's decision that matters
summary:
Main
What does a Trump presidency mean for Iran and its oil exports? This insight explores the potential implications and why the expected impact may actually be minimal. By Armen Azizian
Trump is likely to ramp up sanctions on Iran, following his policy pre-Biden when the United States left the JCPOA and sanctioned Iran unilaterally.
